steps.title: Explain the evolutionary puzzle
steps.content: The scientists think known benefits of deep sleep do not fully explain why such a vulnerable behavior became widespread. That implies deep sleep may provide additional benefits that researchers have not yet identified.

steps.title: Reject overbroad ideas
steps.content: B generalizes about most traits, C shifts away from function, and D merely says beneficial traits can also be risky. None explains why deep sleep would spread despite its vulnerability. The answer is A.
